title: Education, training and seminars
description: Deductions for self-education, conferences and training. You can't claim children's school fees or care.
keywords: self-education, conferences, training, school fees, child care

child_links.title: Self-education expenses
child_links.description: Deductions for self-education expenses if the education has a sufficient connection to your employment activities.

child_links.title: School fees and child care
child_links.description: You can't claim a deduction for child care, or for school or higher education fees for your children.

child_links.title: Seminars conferences and training courses
child_links.description: Deductions for attending seminars, conferences, and first aid or other training courses connected with your work.
